conditions.name: Urinary tract infection (UTI)
conditions.description: Infection in the urinary system, often causing painful urination, urgency, and frequency.

questions.text: When did your symptoms start?
Do you have pain or burning when urinating?
Do you have fever?
Do you have back pain or flank pain?
Could you be pregnant?

conditions.name: Pink eye (conjunctivitis)
conditions.description: Inflammation of the conjunctiva causing redness, discharge, or itching in one or both eyes.
possibleTreatments: Antibiotic or antiviral eye drops (if indicated)

questions.text: When did the eye problem begin?
Is it one eye or both eyes?
Do you have discharge? What color?
Do you wear contact lenses?
Please upload 2 clear photos of the affected eye(s). (Demo: no upload)

conditions.name: Yeast infection
conditions.description: Fungal infection often causing itching, discharge, and discomfort in the vaginal area.

questions.text: When did symptoms begin?
Do you have itching or irritation?
Do you have unusual discharge?
Have you had this before?
Could you be pregnant?

conditions.name: Acne
conditions.description: Skin condition with pimples, blackheads, or cysts, often on face, chest, or back.

questions.text: How long have you had acne or flare-ups?
Where is it mainly located?
Have you tried any treatments before?
Please upload 2–3 photos (close-up and wider view). (Demo: no upload)

conditions.name: Sinus infection
conditions.description: Infection or inflammation of the sinuses, often with facial pressure, congestion, and headache.

questions.text: When did symptoms start?
Do you have facial pain or pressure?
What color is your nasal discharge?
Do you have fever?
